## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / improvement to the template
- [ ] Chore (deps, tooling, docs)
- [ ] Breaking change (affects downstream forks)

## Breaking changes

<!-- If this is a breaking change, describe what forks need to update after merging. -->

## Pre-merge checklist

- [ ] `bun run tsc` passes (no type errors)
- [ ] `bun run lint` passes (no ESLint errors)
- [ ] `bun run format:check` passes (code is formatted)
- [ ] Tested on at least one platform (iOS simulator / Android emulator / Expo Go / web)
- [ ] No `.env` values, secrets, or API keys committed
- [ ] README / CLAUDE.md updated if behavior changed
